{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Weather Authority
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Weather Authority]] predicted no rain.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4">''The Captain'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Weather Authority]] is a group whose spells control the weather.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
